files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index 2a6762c..9475c98 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -89,2 +89,4 @@
     "check:stripe-webhook-handoff-live:preflight": "node scripts/check-stripe-webhook-handoff-live.mjs --preflight",
+    "check:stripe-webhook-signature-live": "node scripts/check-stripe-webhook-handoff-live.mjs --signature-only",
+    "check:proof-freshness-live": "node scripts/check-proof-freshness-live.mjs",
     "write:stripe-webhook-smoke-approval": "node scripts/write-stripe-webhook-smoke-approval.mjs",

files.reason: Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
